payload.title: Budget Watch June 2023 Flash Report
payload.description: Summary of May Results and YTD May 2023 financial results for the MTA

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.claim_text: Preliminary April 2023 employment in New York City marks the 25th consecutive month of employment recovery, compared with one year earlier, since the COVID pandemic began, with an increase of 150,600 jobs (3.3%) when compared with April 2022.
payload.subject: New York City employment

tool_args.label: April 2023 NYC Employment Higher than Pre-Pandemic

payload.raw_value_text: up 8,300 jobs (0.2%) when compared with April 2019

payload.claim_text: YTD May passenger revenues were down $542 million (28%) compared with YTD May 2019 and May passenger revenues were $150 million (27%) below May 2019.
payload.subject: MTA passenger revenue

payload.claim_text: From January 2011 through February 2020, the twelve-month employment average increased 24.1%, while the 12-month MTA-wide ridership average fell 0.7%. The COVID pandemic has altered these trajectories: compared with January 2017, April employment is 5.0% higher, while MTA-wide ridership is 39.9% lower.
payload.subject: MTA ridership vs NYC employment

tool_args.label: Ridership Data Preliminary and Subject to Revision

payload.gap_text: Ridership data are preliminary and subject to revision as well as adjustments warranted by annual audit review.
payload.missing_information: Ridership figures in this report are preliminary and may be revised

tool_args.label: Prepared by MTA Division of Management & Budget

payload.description: Budget Watch June 2023 Flash Report prepared by MTA Division of Management & Budget

issues: object_local_observation_id references missing local observation id "entity_meeting_doc_113981_mta_dmb". Submit an observation with local_observation_id "entity_meeting_doc_113981_mta_dmb" before submitting this relation.
